cityjsonSamples.label: Hamburg city center - official LoD2 buildings
cityjsonSamples.description: Same-origin CityJSONSeq building showcase from the Elbe waterfront through Rathaus to Jungfernstieg. The default demo also processes the committed matching OSM road crop through browser osm2streets.

cityjsonSamples.label: Hamburg osm2streets roads - real fixture
cityjsonSamples.description: Real native osm2streets lane-polygons output from the Hamburg short-intersection OSM fixture, converted to CityJSON Transportation Road surfaces.

planningLayers.label: Hamburg XPlan building-use areas
planningLayers.notes: Fetched live by bbox; no backend needed while CORS remains open.

planningLayers.label: Hamburg FNP land-use fallback
planningLayers.notes: Fetched as GeoJSON by bbox when XPlan has no polygons for the viewport.
